full_text: Yeah, the worst, I mean, the worst part is, like, yeah, you're thinking about the next game more than likely, but you're also thinking, like, man, am I going to potentially get reversed 3-0? Like, that is one of the thoughts that runs through your mind, especially when you kind of, it's not just about losing a game four, you're getting, you're getting dominated right now. Now, that's an error from Miya that's going to open the door slightly.
